title: White Screen Prevention TDD Patterns
description: Comprehensive TDD patterns and methodologies to prevent React white screen failures

londsonSchool.applicability: High for import validation and error boundary testing

chicagoSchool.applicability: Medium for mounting sequence and error boundary integration

implementation.testName: all imported components exist and render
App renders all routes without import errors
components initialize without temporal dead zone errors

ciCdIntegration.implementation: GitHub Actions workflow with component import validation

whiteScreenDetection.implementation: Visual regression testing with DOM content validation

patternGeneration.implementation: Automatic test case generation from component imports

testMaintenance.mitigation: Automated test generation and pattern-based updates

falsePositives.mitigation: Confidence threshold tuning and manual validation

performanceImpact.mitigation: Parallel test execution and selective validation

learningOutcomes.patternDatabase: Comprehensive white screen failure patterns captured
learningOutcomes.preventionFramework: Reusable TDD patterns for similar React failures
